# getPeers

Returns the list of peers connected to the node.

## Import

```ts
import { RpcClient, HttpHandler } from 'casper-js-sdk';
```

## Usage

```ts
const result = await rpcClient.getPeers();

console.log(`Connected to ${result.peers.length} peers`);
for (const peer of result.peers) {
  console.log(peer.nodeId, peer.address);
}
```

## Return Value

`Promise<InfoGetPeerResult>`

```ts
interface InfoGetPeerResult {
  peers: Peer[];
}

interface Peer {
  nodeId: string;   // node's public key identifier
  address: string;  // IP:port
}
```
